body_preview: - Running `yyds state --help` shows the main CLI help text instead of state subcommand-specific help. Same for `yyds state graph --help`, `yyds deepseek --help`, and other subcommands. - The assessment confirms: "Subcommand --help flags (yyds state --help, yyds state graph --help) show the main CLI help instead of subcommand-specific help. This is a minor UX
expected_evidence: The `yyds state --help` output no longer matches `yyds --help` output. Existing tests in dispatch_sub.rs that assert `--help` behavior continue to pass. No regression in subcommand routing for non-help invocations. Implementation Notes: The fix is in `src/dispatch_sub.rs`, function `try_dispatch_subcommand`. Current code (lines 48-56): ```rust if args.iter()
title: Fix subcommand --help flag to show subcommand-specific help
